activities.instructions: Report the statement with “said that”.
activities.prompt: Nina: “I work in the city centre.”

evaluator.answer: Nina said that she worked in the city centre

activities.explanation: «I work» pasa a «she worked».

activities.instructions: Report the statement with “said that”.
activities.prompt: Omar: “I am feeling better.”

evaluator.answer: Omar said that he was feeling better

activities.explanation: El presente continuo pasa a pasado continuo.

activities.instructions: Report the statement with “told me that”.
activities.prompt: Lena to me: “The shop is closing.”

evaluator.answer: Lena told me that the shop was closing

activities.explanation: «Told» lleva el objeto «me» y el verbo retrocede.

activities.instructions: Report the statement with “said that”.
activities.prompt: Paula: “I don't recognise the number.”

evaluator.answer: Paula said that she didn't recognise the number

activities.explanation: La negativa presente pasa a negativa pasada.

activities.instructions: Report the statement with “told us that”.
activities.prompt: Sam to us: “I am ready.”

evaluator.answer: Sam told us that he was ready

activities.explanation: El pronombre cambia a «he» y «am» a «was».

activities.instructions: Report the statement later with “said that”.
activities.prompt: Arun: “I lost my access card.”

evaluator.answer: Arun said that he had lost his access card

activities.explanation: El pasado simple pasa a past perfect y cambia el posesivo.

activities.instructions: Report the statement later with “said that”.
activities.prompt: The volunteers: “We have collected enough blankets.”

evaluator.answer: The volunteers said that they had collected enough blankets

activities.explanation: Present perfect pasa a past perfect y «we» a «they».

activities.instructions: Report the statement with “said that”.
activities.prompt: Iris: “I will send the revised plan.”

evaluator.answer: Iris said that she would send the revised plan

activities.explanation: «Will» cambia a «would».

activities.instructions: Report the statement with “told Mia that”.
activities.prompt: Noah to Mia: “I can meet you after work.”

evaluator.answer: Noah told Mia that he could meet her after work

activities.explanation: «Can» pasa a «could» y «you» se refiere a Mia.

activities.instructions: Report the negative statement with “said that”.
activities.prompt: The supplier: “We haven't received your payment.”

evaluator.answer: The supplier said that they hadn't received our payment

activities.explanation: «Haven't received» pasa a «hadn't received» y el destinatario informa como «our».

activities.instructions: Report the statement the following day, changing time references.
activities.prompt: Ruth: “I am busy now.”

evaluator.answer: Ruth said that she was busy then

activities.explanation: Cambian «am» a «was» y «now» a «then».

activities.instructions: Report the statement several days later, changing time references.
activities.prompt: On Tuesday, Finn said: “I will return tomorrow.”

evaluator.answer: Finn said that he would return the next day

activities.explanation: «Will» cambia a «would» y «tomorrow» a «the next day».

activities.instructions: Report the statement several days later, changing time references.
activities.prompt: Leila: “I completed this form yesterday.”

evaluator.answer: Leila said that she had completed that form the day before

activities.explanation: Cambian el tiempo verbal, «this» y «yesterday».

activities.instructions: Report after leaving the location, changing place and demonstratives.
activities.prompt: Dara: “I keep these samples here.”

evaluator.answer: Dara said that she kept those samples there

activities.explanation: «These» pasa a «those» y «here» a «there».

activities.instructions: Report the obligation later with “said that”.
activities.prompt: Sara: “I must renew my licence.”

evaluator.answer: Sara said that she had to renew her licence

activities.explanation: El «must» de obligación cambia a «had to».

activities.instructions: Report the statement later with “told Karim that”, changing all pronouns and possessives.
activities.prompt: Nora to Karim: “I put your keys in my drawer.”

evaluator.answer: Nora told Karim that she had put his keys in her drawer

activities.explanation: «I/my» se refieren a Nora y «your» a Karim.

activities.instructions: Report the statement the following week, changing all references.
activities.prompt: On Friday, Hugo said: “I will bring this equipment here tomorrow.”

evaluator.answer: Hugo said that he would bring that equipment there the next day

activities.explanation: Cambian pronombre, modal, demostrativo, lugar y tiempo.

activities.instructions: Report the scientific fact, keeping the present because it remains true.
activities.prompt: The lecturer: “The Moon moves around the Earth.”

evaluator.answer: The lecturer said that the Moon moves around the Earth

activities.explanation: El hecho astronómico vigente mantiene el presente.

activities.instructions: Report the habitual statement using the present reporting verb “says”.
activities.prompt: Every Monday, Farah says: “I need the updated rota.”

evaluator.answer: Farah says that she needs the updated rota every Monday

activities.explanation: Con «says» se mantiene el presente y «need» concuerda con «she».

activities.instructions: Report the statement later with “said that”, keeping the past perfect unchanged.
activities.prompt: Marta: “I had already checked the total.”

evaluator.answer: Marta said that she had already checked the total

activities.explanation: El past perfect no retrocede más.

activities.instructions: Report the statement the following week with “told Omar that”, changing every necessary element.
activities.prompt: Priya to Omar: “I can't meet you here tomorrow because I have lost my travel card.”

evaluator.answer: Priya told Omar that she couldn't meet him there the next day because she had lost her travel card

activities.explanation: Cambian modal, pronombres, lugar, tiempo y present perfect.

activities.instructions: Report the statement later, backshifting the action in progress while preserving the clear “when” event.
activities.prompt: Rosa: “I was checking these figures when my computer stopped.”

evaluator.answer: Rosa said that she had been checking those figures when her computer stopped

activities.explanation: La acción en progreso retrocede a past perfect continuous; el evento puntual de «when» permanece en pasado simple.

activities.instructions: Report the statement later with “said that”, changing possibility, future and time.
activities.prompt: Noor to me: “The repair may take longer, so I will call you tomorrow.”

evaluator.answer: Noor said that the repair might take longer, so she would call me the next day

activities.explanation: «May» pasa a «might», «will» a «would», «you» a «me» y cambia el tiempo.

activities.instructions: Report the statement later, keeping the past perfect and “could” unchanged.
activities.prompt: Eva: “I had saved the file, so I could restore the earlier version.”

evaluator.answer: Eva said that she had saved the file, so she could restore the earlier version

activities.explanation: Past perfect y «could» se mantienen; cambian los pronombres.

activities.instructions: Report the statement the following month with “told the team that”, changing obligation, demonstratives and time.
activities.prompt: Amina to the team: “I must submit these forms next week.”

evaluator.answer: Amina told the team that she had to submit those forms the following week

activities.explanation: Cambian «must», «I», «these» y «next week».
